status: Awaiting user decision on design direction
target_audience: Premium women's fashion and home customers in Turkey

typography.style: Massive typography, very light/thin mixed with ultra black for tension.

layout_rules.hero: Asymmetric layout, full-bleed images with overlapping typography.
layout_rules.product_grid: Irregular bento-style grid, varying image sizes (2x1, 1x1).
layout_rules.pdp: Immersive sticky scroll gallery on desktop, full-screen swipeable cards on mobile.
layout_rules.mobile_nav: Sticky bottom bar with transparent crystal glassmorphism.

typography.style: Generous letter spacing, small labels, subtle hierarchy.

layout_rules.hero: Cinematic full-screen lifestyle image, centered subtle typography.
layout_rules.pdp: Clean split screen: left gallery, right sticky details.
layout_rules.mobile_nav: Hidden until scroll up, minimalist hamburger menu.

typography.style: Capitalized headings, formal serif, gold/champagne accents.

layout_rules.hero: Structured carousel with framing borders, classic CTA buttons.
layout_rules.product_grid: Uniform grid with elegant hover effects (second image on hover).
layout_rules.pdp: Traditional layout, large image with breadcrumbs and accordion details.
layout_rules.mobile_nav: Classic top nav with prominent cart and account icons.

shadcn_customizations.Button: Remove default rounded-md. Use rounded-none for Option A & B. Add subtle hover scale.
shadcn_customizations.Card: Avoid default borders. Use border-transparent with soft shadow for Option C, purely flat for Option A/B.
shadcn_customizations.Accordion: Use for PDP details (Shipping, Materials). Remove default underline on hover.
shadcn_customizations.Sheet: Use for Mobile Drawer Nav and Mini-cart. Customize overlay to backdrop-blur-md.
shadcn_customizations.Select: Use for size/color variants. Style to match minimal inputs with 1px border.
shadcn_customizations.Carousel: Use for Homepage hero and PDP mobile gallery.

implementation_roadmap: Phase 1: Setup - Configure Tailwind config, variables, and fonts based on user's selected Option.
Phase 2: Global Layout - Implement Header (Mega-menu Desktop, Drawer Mobile) & Footer.
Phase 3: Homepage - Build Hero, Lookbook section, and curated Product Carousels.
Phase 4: PLP - Implement Product Grid, Filters Drawer, and Sort Dropdown.
Phase 5: PDP - Build Image Gallery, Sticky Cart, Size Guide Modal, and Accordion details.
Phase 6: Cart & Checkout - Implement Mini-cart Drawer, single-page seamless checkout (Iyzico integration UI).

accessibility_and_performance.motion: Use Framer Motion for page transitions. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
accessibility_and_performance.images: Lazy load all non-hero images. Max height 80vh on mobile to prevent blocking.
accessibility_and_performance.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Wait for the user to specify their chosen design direction (A, B, or C). Once selected, apply the exact typography, colors, and layout rules for that option across the implementation phases.
